title: Parameterize a CloudFormation Template
description:
## Reusable Templates With Parameters

Parameters make a template reusable across environments; resources reference them with the `Ref` intrinsic.

**Your task:** write **`/root/cfn-param.yaml`** that:
1. has a **`Parameters`** section with a parameter named **`EnvName`** (Type `String`)
2. has a **`Resources`** section that **references** that parameter (using `Ref` / `!Ref EnvName`)

> 💡 You may use either the full form `Ref: EnvName` or the short form `!Ref EnvName`. The check looks for a Parameters section and a Ref to EnvName.

hints.title: Parameter + Ref
hints.body: Declare the parameter, then reference it from a resource property with Ref.
hints.command:
printf 'Parameters:
  EnvName:
    Type: String
    Default: dev
Resources:
  Topic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Ref EnvName
' > /root/cfn-param.yaml

validation.description: Checks for a Parameters section, an EnvName parameter, and a Ref to it.

commands.description: Declares a Parameters section with EnvName
